No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its specific targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education focused on vocational skills for professional translation (Target 4.3, 4.4) and promotes cultural understanding through cross-cultural communication (Target 4.7). Both models agreed on this high score.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Translating 'news current events' and 'political social' texts supports public access to information (Target 16.10). The emphasis on 'Respect Copyright' also aligns with promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'match publishers with professional translators', forming multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17). It also facilitates 'cross-cultural communication' and 'knowledge dissemination', supporting cross-border knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) and capacity building (Target 17.9).
